message: Invalid scope: ["file_code_connect:write", "file_dev_resources:read", "file_dev_resources:write", "library_content:read", "team_library_content:read", "library_assets:read", "file_versions:read", "file_metadata:read", "file_content:read", "file_comments:write", "file_comments:read", "projects:read", "project_metadata:read", "webhooks:read", "webhooks:write", "current_user:read"].
